notes: v1.14.121 - B4 follow-up (Rule C, completed): make showWorkTab('deploy') the single chokepoint that lands on the Command Center, so EVERY Work>Deploy entry skips the dead 'Open Deploy' launcher stub - not just the Work-grid card (.120) but also the Command-page Deploy launcher (cmd_route 'work','deploy'), the Stage-2 search graceful-degrades (goOpsTab/rackmap/sop/triage/qrDeepLink -> Work/Deploy), and the nav drill. showWorkTab now calls deploy_showCommandCenter(deploy_opsHost()) for target==='deploy' (mirrors the existing target==='issues' issue_pageOpen special-case); deploy_showCommandCenter renders into the host and does NOT call showWorkTab, so no recursion. Callers wanting a specific deploy/rack detail render it AFTER (detail wins). Reverted the .120 DEPLOY card onclick back to showWorkTab('deploy') so there's one mechanism, no double-render. Browser-verified at 412x915: 5 entry paths (direct showWorkTab, Work-grid card tap, cmd_route launcher, goOpsTab graceful-degrade, deploy_goToDashboard) ALL land on Command Center (LIST/+NEW), zero console errors, no stack/recursion. Redesign-only (showWorkTab is New-UI routing; legacy never calls it) -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical. node --check x3 + sw.js, brace gate, three-stamp lockstep, CRLF-preserving. DEVICE-VERIFY: every way into Work>Deploy (card, Command 'Deploy' launcher, search 'sop'/'rack map'/'link down') lands straight on Command Center with no 'Open Deploy' middle screen; opening a specific deployment/rack still shows its detail; ?legacy=1 unchanged.
